rows.description: Pd Land Tax for ye year 1761.
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms '07 4 0' in the shillings, pence, and fraction columns respectively. Pounds column is empty. 'ye' for 'the' is visually more accurate than 'y.'. Selected GPT-5-mini's interpretation of amounts but adjusted for empty pounds, and combined best description parts.
rows.english_description: Payment of the land tax for the year 1761.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of the land tax for the year 1761, amounting to £0 7s 4d.

rows.description: Dr Kennicotts y. Subscription for y. year 1762.

rows.english_description: Dr Kennicott's yearly subscription for the year 1762.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dr Kennicott's yearly subscription for the year 1762, amounting to £0 5s 5d.

rows.notes: Visual verification shows amounts '00 1 0'. Pounds column is empty. GPT-5-mini accurately identified shillings and pence values, while Gemini-flash had a better capitalized description. Combined best elements.

rows.description: Mr Watts Bill abt Merton affair (pd by Dr Tmay)

rows.description: Given to sufferers by Warham fire (pd by ditto)
rows.notes: Consensus on monetary amounts (£1 s19 d6). Visual verification confirms the '1' in pounds column and 'Given to sufferers by Warham fire' as described by Gemini-flash. Selected Gemini-flash's description for accuracy.

rows.description: Carriage of Letter to Ayahoo &c (by ditto)
rows.notes: Visual verification shows amounts '00 2 0'. Pounds column is empty. GPT-5-mini correctly identified shillings and pence column alignment. Gemini-flash had a more accurate description ('Letter' and 'Ayahoo'). Combined best elements.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Carriage/postage for a letter to Ayahoo and others, amounting to £0 0s 2d.

rows.notes: Visual verification confirms '16g 11 10' where 'g' is a known symbol for Pounds. Gemini-flash correctly interpreted this as 16 Pounds. GPT-5-mini incorrectly read '16g' as '169' pounds. Both agreed on shillings and pence.

Consensus on monetary amounts. Visual verification confirms the amount is written as part of the description, making GPT-5-mini's description more accurate. GPT-5-mini also correctly classified it as 'total'.

rows.description: Recepta anni Instantis sc: a 2do Nov: 1761. ad 2do Nov: 1762.
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms this line is a header with no monetary amounts. Gemini-flash incorrectly combined this with the subsequent entry's amount into a single row. Selected Gemini-flash's description for accurate Latin transcription ('Instantis' vs 'sistanty').
rows.section_header: Recepta anni Instantis sc: a 2do Nov: 1761. ad 2do Nov: 1762.

rows.notes: This row was incorrectly merged by Gemini-flash with the preceding header, effectively making it a 'missing' row from that extractor. Visual verification confirms it is a distinct entry with date on the left and a clear monetary amount (993 Pounds, 9 Shillings, 6 1/4 Pence) on the right. Selected GPT-5-mini's accurate extraction for this row.
rows.section_header: Recepta anni Instantis sc: a 2do Nov: 1761. ad 2do Nov: 1762.

rows.notes: Consensus on monetary amounts. Visual verification confirms this is a total, with the amount written as part of the description. Selected GPT-5-mini's row type and included the amount in the description (as per visual). Corrected 'soluti deducti' to 'Solutis Deductis' based on clearer image reading.
rows.section_header: Recepta anni Instantis sc: a 2do Nov: 1761. ad 2do Nov: 1762.

rows.notes: Consensus on monetary amounts and row type. Visual verification confirms the amount is written as part of the description. Selected GPT-5-mini's description which includes the amount.
rows.section_header: Recepta anni Instantis sc: a 2do Nov: 1761. ad 2do Nov: 1762.

rows.notes: Visual verification confirms no amounts. Selected GPT-5-mini's row type ('header') as it functions as an annotation/header, which is a better fit than 'entry'. Selected Gemini-flash's description for accurate 'quo' (vs 'pro').
Consensus on row type and no amounts. Selected Gemini-flash's capitalization for description, which matches the visual.

Visual verification confirms Gemini-flash's description is perfectly accurate. GPT-5-mini had a significant misreading. Classified as 'entry' as it's an item in a list of signatories, not a section header.

rows.notes: Both extractors' descriptions are largely accurate. Selected Gemini-flash's exact description and row type ('entry') as it's an item in a list of signatories.
